waiting_for: Pullback to EMA75 (~30001.50) or 30000 psychological level for EMA_BOUNCE/LEVEL_TRADE long entry

long_assessment.reasoning: Uptrend remains intact (EMA21 30014.34 > EMA75 30001.45 > EMA150 29975.01). Price pulled back 4.34 pts below EMA21 to 30010, deeper than prior bar, but holds above EMA75 and 30000 key level. Stochastic cooled to 57.22 from 62.57, removing overbought risk. A resting LIMIT at rising EMA75 (30001.50) captures the next leg of the pullback with 40-pt stop (below EMA150) targeting 30100 major psychological level (30095 after 5pt buffer). Risk 40 pts, reward 93.5 pts = 2.34:1 R/R. Confluence: EMA75 dynamic support + 30000 psychological magnet + trend alignment.

short_assessment.reasoning: No viable short setup. Trend strongly bullish with perfectly aligned EMAs. Stochastic (57.22) neutral, not overbought. Nearest bullish FVG below (29950-29967) is 60 pts away — too distant for counter-trend R/R. Price holding above 30000 psychological support. Shorting a healthy uptrend pullback lacks confluence and violates trend-following discipline.
